title: [BOUNTY #67] Add .trashclaw.toml project config with auto-loaded context files
body:
## Bounty Claim: Issue #67

**Task**: Add .trashclaw.toml project config with auto-loaded context files
**Reward**: 10 RTC
**Wallet**: RTCb72a1accd46b9ba9f22dbd4b5c6aad5a5831572b

---

## Implementation Complete

### Features Implemented

1. **load_project_config()** - Loads .trashclaw.toml or .trashclaw.json from CWD
2. **_parse_simple_toml()** - Simple TOML parser for Python <3.11 (stdlib only)
3. **tomllib support** - Native TOML parsing for Python 3.11+
4. **context_files** - Auto-loads specified files into conversation context
5. **system_prompt** - Appends custom instructions to system prompt
6. **model** - Overrides model name from config
7. **auto_shell** - Skips shell approval when enabled
8. **JSON fallback** - Supports .trashclaw.json as alternative format

### Test Suite

Created comprehensive test suite: test_project_config.py

**Results**: 12/12 tests passed

---

## Payment Information

**PayPal**: 979749654@qq.com
**ETH (Ethereum)**: 0x31e323edC293B940695ff04aD1AFdb56d473351D
**GitHub**: Dlove123
**RTC Wallet**: RTCb72a1accd46b9ba9f22dbd4b5c6aad5a5831572b

---

**ETA**: Completed in <1 hour
**Quality**: Production-ready with full test coverage
head: Dlove123:main
